action_text: Press Escape to close the search context popover
rationale: The “Choose search context” popover is likely blocking clicks on the list; pressing Escape should dismiss it so we can interact with the report list.

action_text: Click the filter/show-hide icon to open the list filter builder
rationale: Opening the list filter will let us search for the report by Title directly on the View/Run page.

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort the reports by title
rationale: Sorting by Title can help quickly locate a report named “Incidents by agent” within the list.
Clicking the page header will remove focus from the global search and may dismiss the popover, restoring normal interactions.
If the desired report isn’t visible, scrolling down can reveal more report entries to select from.
